query: 本年以来收益率最高的10只基金是哪些

args.sql: SELECT fund_code, fund_name, ROUND(portfolio_return*100,2) AS 本年以来收益率_pct FROM fund_performance WHERE period='本年以来' ORDER BY portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10

plan.rationale: Retrieve funds sorted by year-to-date portfolio return in descending order, limiting to top 10.

generated_sql_result.fund_name: 国寿安保数字经济股票发起式(A类)
富国标普石油天然气勘探及生产精选行业ETF(QDII)
嘉实标普石油天然气勘探及生产精选行业ETF(QDII)
博时标普石油天然气勘探及生产精选行业指数发起式(QDII)(A类)
华宝标普油气上游股票指数(QDII-LOF)(A类)

建信易盛郑商所能源化工期货ETF

notes: Period defaults to '本年以来' as no performance period specified.
